title: Hot Air Balloons [1.20]
description: Make hot air balloons spawn around your world!
body:
## <center>Ever wanted more structure datapacks that spawns things in the sky?
### <center>Download this to make cool hot air balloons spawn around your world!
![Two balloons in the sky.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b7a421cb149e1c91eacb8ead9756934e7cf5fc0.png)
_(Not typical spawn rates)_

**⊱ ────── {⋅. ✯ .⋅} ────── ⊰**

Full credit goes to **[Ercerus](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ercerus/)** for creating the original datapack. It's only for 1.18, and he stated that the project will no longer be updated, so I decided to port it to 1.20 myself!

I edited the config to make the balloons spawn more often, but not so often that it gets annoying (IMO). If they still spawn too often for you, download "Rare" or "Legacy". If you want them to spawn more frequently, download "Common".
Don't try to edit the JSONs yourself, it will break the datapack for some reason. Use **[this](https://misode.github.io/upgrader/)** instead.

Currently, these are just for decoration and there is no loot that spawns with these balloons, simply a villager (unless you count that as loot...)

»Original PMC page for 1.18: **[Balloons](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/ballons/)** 🎈

»The **[Datapack Upgrader](https://misode.github.io/upgrader/)** that made this possible!

**⊱ ────── {⋅. ✯ .⋅} ────── ⊰**

![Discord](https://64.media.tumblr.com/8f0546f103857fb23d54b77273a906ec/bcc7c31212ad8692-4a/s250x400/59ae17585bbc636c8c7191bd0daea739979624ca.png)

**Shoot me a message @nixy.nebula on Discord for questions/inqueries or if you find any bugs with this!**

**⊱ ────── {⋅. ✯ .⋅} ────── ⊰**
